login.title: Login to Platform
login.subtitle: Access your recruitment management dashboard
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
login.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.passwordExpiredMessage: Your password has expired. Please set a new one.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Verification
twoFactor.subtitleWithEmail: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to continue.
twoFactor.subtitleWithoutEmail: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below to continue.
twoFactor.codeSentToast: We just emailed you a verification code.
twoFactor.noticeBanner: Check your inbox for the verification code. It expires in 10 minutes.
twoFactor.resendSuccess: A new code is on the way.
twoFactor.resendFailed: Could not resend code. Please sign in again.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
forgot.captchaTooltip: Please complete the "I am not a robot" check first
forgot.successMessage: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Enter your new password below
reset.noTokenError: No reset token found. Please use the link from your password reset email.
reset.passwordRequirementsError: Password does not meet the requirements.
reset.submitFailed: Reset failed. The link may have expired or already been used.
reset.successMessage: Password updated successfully. You can now login with your new password.

activation.title: Activate Your Account
activation.subtitle: Set a password to complete your account activation
activation.noTokenError: No activation token found. Please use the link from your invitation email.
activation.passwordRequirementsError: Password does not meet the requirements.
activation.submitFailed: Activation failed. The link may have expired or already been used.
